business.name: Leo's Leaks LTD
business.tagline: Fast, Reliable Plumbing When You Need It

sample_reviews.author: James T.
sample_reviews.text: Leo came out within the hour to fix a burst pipe. Brilliant service, very professional and left the place spotless. Highly recommend!

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M.
sample_reviews.text: Finally found a reliable plumber in Manchester! Fixed our leak quickly and at a fair price. Will definitely use Leo's Leaks again.

sample_reviews.author: David R.
sample_reviews.text: Really impressed with the speed and quality of work. Diagnosed the problem straight away and had it sorted the same day. Great value.

brand.usp: Leo's Leaks LTD offers fast-response, honest plumbing services across Greater Manchester — no hidden charges, no fuss, just quality work you can count on.
brand.hero_headline: Manchester's Trusted Plumber — Leaks Fixed Fast
brand.about_paragraph: Hi, I'm Leo, founder of Leo's Leaks LTD. I've been solving plumbing problems across Greater Manchester for years, and I built this business on one simple promise: to arrive on time, be upfront about costs, and fix the job right first time. Whether it's an emergency leak or a planned bathroom installation, I treat every home like my own.
